title: Activity Log for folders
excerpt:
Someone created a folder, and I’d like to know who created it and when. 
I don’t see any folder-related information in the activity log (maybe I missed something…).

posts.author: Mosheo (Moshe)

Someone created a folder, and I’d like to know who created it and when.
